Tax.description: The total tax amount charged on the invoice, typically formatted as currency (e.g., $2.00)

PurchaseOrderNumber.description: The unique purchase order number associated with this invoice transaction

ShippedToVendorName.description: The name of the individual vendor or contact person at the recipient company who received the shipment

Subtotal.description: The sum of all line items before taxes and additional charges are applied, formatted as currency (e.g., $63.00)

ShippedFromName.description: The name of the individual who shipped or authorized the shipment from the sender's location

Website.description: The merchant's or sender's company website URL (e.g., www.herolimited.com)

ShippedToCompanyPhoneNumber.description: The primary phone number of the recipient company where the items were shipped

Total.description: The final total amount including all taxes and charges, formatted as currency (e.g., $65.00)

ShippedToCompanyName.description: The name of the company or business that received the shipment

ShippedFromCompanyPhoneNumber.description: The primary phone number of the sender company that shipped the items

Merchant.description: The name of the merchant or vendor company issuing the invoice and providing the goods or services

DatedAs.description: The official date of the invoice or transaction, typically in MM/DD/YYYY format (e.g., 04/10/2023)

Email.description: The primary email address of the merchant or sender company for accounts and billing inquiries

ShippedToCompanyAddress.description: The complete mailing address of the recipient company, including street, city, state, and postal code

Signature.description: The signature or name of the authorized person who signed or approved the invoice or shipping document

ShippedFromCompanyName.description: The name of the company or business that sent the shipment and issued the invoice

ShippedFromCompanyAddress.description: The complete mailing address of the sender company, including street, city, state, and postal code
